spec.name: stillness_guard
spec.description: Auto-detects idle states in resource_manager.py without triggering task scans
spec.implementation: Detects resource_manager idle thresholds and suppresses scan triggers until activity resumes.
spec.rationale: Prevents unnecessary task scans during idle periods, improving efficiency and respecting static hum.

rationale: Need to propose the stillness_guard capability to resource_manager.py to enforce idle detection without scan interruptions.
